heroHeadline: IDF Strikes Tabriz Petrochemical; Iran Targets Gulf Aluminium Plants; Trump Eyes Kharg Island; April 6 Deadline Looms
heroSubtitle: IDF struck Tabriz Petrochemical Company sending Brent to ~$115; Iran retaliated with strikes on ALBA Bahrain and Emirates Global Aluminium (Abu Dhabi); Iranian missile hit Ne'ot Hovav chemical plant in Israel; Trump floated Kharg Island seizure in FT interview; USS Tripoli arrived with 3,500 Marines; 4-nation Islamabad summit on diplomacy; CENTCOM confirms Iran missile rate down 90%; analysts warn of 'April oil cliff' as SPR buffers expire mid-April; April 6 hard deadline for Hormuz reopening remains firm
footerNote: Data updated 2026-03-30. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, Financial Times, CNN, NPR, Washington Post, USNI News, Goldman Sachs, Rystad Energy, IEA.
